title: AIADMK faction led by C.Ve. Shanmugam declares support to TVK; says EPS wanted to be CM with DMK backing
description: We are no longer in any pre-poll alliance, says former Minister C.Ve. Shanmugam; it is believed of the total of 47 AIADMK legislators, 30 MLAs are with the group led by Mr. Shanmugam and S.P. Velumani.
